validation_command: python -X utf8 scripts/db/reset_hb_track_test.py && cd "Hb Track - Backend" && python -m pytest -q tests/training/invariants/test_inv_train_058_session_structure_mutable.py tests/training/invariants/test_inv_train_059_exercise_order_contiguous.py -v 2>&1 | python -c "import sys, re; lines=sys.stdin.readlines(); [print(re.sub(r' - \d+\.\d+s', '', l).rstrip()) for l in lines[-30:] if any(w in l for w in ['PASSED','FAILED','ERROR','xfailed','xpassed','passed','failed','error','XFAIL','XPASS','skipped']) and 'warnings' not in l] or [print(lines[-1].rstrip())]"
